    {"id": "c_ai_coe", "name": "AI Center of Excellence", "aliases": ["AI CoE"], "description": "A program created within the General Services Administration to facilitate and improve Federal adoption and use of artificial intelligence.", "grounding_span": "the ‘‘AI Center of Excellence’’, which shall—", "location": "SEC. 3 (a)"},
    {"id": "c_adoption", "name": "Adoption of artificial intelligence technologies in the Federal Government", "aliases": ["AI adoption"], "description": "The uptake of AI technologies across Federal agencies, which the AI CoE is to facilitate.", "grounding_span": "facilitate the adoption of artificial intel-", "location": "SEC. 3 (a)(1)"},
    {"id": "c_agency", "name": "Federal Government agency", "aliases": ["agency"], "description": "An agency as defined by section 3502 of title 44, United States Code, the unit subject to the Act's requirements.", "grounding_span": "the term ‘‘agency’’ has the meaning given", "location": "SEC. 2 (2)"},
    {"id": "c_cohesion", "name": "Cohesion and competency in AI adoption and use", "aliases": [], "description": "Improved coordination and capability across the Federal Government in adopting and using AI.", "grounding_span": "improve cohesion and competency in the", "location": "SEC. 3 (b)"},
    {"id": "c_dissemination", "name": "Dissemination of information on AI programs, pilots, and initiatives", "aliases": [], "description": "Collecting and publishing information about agency AI programs, pilots, and initiatives.", "grounding_span": "collecting, aggregating, and publishing on a", "location": "SEC. 3 (b)(2)"},
    {"id": "c_acquisition", "name": "Acquisition and use of artificial intelligence", "aliases": [], "description": "Federal acquisition and operational use of AI, on which the AI CoE advises agencies.", "grounding_span": "advising the Administrator, the Director,", "location": "SEC. 3 (b)(3)"},
    {"id": "c_data_mgmt", "name": "Management and use of data in AI applications", "aliases": [], "description": "Applying Federal data policies to data used within AI applications.", "grounding_span": "assist agencies in applying Federal policies", "location": "SEC. 3 (b)(4)"},

    {"id": "c_national_investment", "name": "Research and national investment in artificial intelligence", "aliases": [], "description": "Policy on research and national investment in AI, on which OSTP is advised.", "grounding_span": "advising the Director of the Office of", "location": "SEC. 3 (b)(7)"},
    {"id": "c_barriers", "name": "Removing barriers to agency use of AI", "aliases": [], "description": "Approaches to remove barriers to agency AI use while promoting innovative application.", "grounding_span": "recommend approaches to remove barriers", "location": "SEC. 4 (a)(2)"},
    {"id": "c_civil", "name": "Civil liberties, civil rights, and economic and national security", "aliases": [], "description": "Protected interests to be preserved while promoting innovative AI application.", "grounding_span": "protecting civil lib-", "location": "SEC. 4 (a)(2)"},
    {"id": "c_bias", "name": "Discriminatory impact or bias", "aliases": ["algorithmic bias"], "description": "Discriminatory impact or bias on the basis of protected classifications arising from AI use.", "grounding_span": "mitigating any discriminatory impact or", "location": "SEC. 4 (a)(3)"},

    {"id": "cl_plans", "claim_text": "Each agency head shall submit either a plan to achieve consistency with the memorandum or a written determination that the agency does not use and does not anticipate using AI.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "a written determination that the agency", "location": "SEC. 4 (c)"},
